title: Jammu, Jammu and Kashmir — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Jammu, Jammu and Kashmir: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Jammu is a city in Jammu and Kashmir with a population of 700,000. The winter capital of Jammu and Kashmir, known for its ancient temples, Vaishno Devi shrine, and as a gateway to the Kashmir Valley.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
